description:
Highlights

  • Strong Adhesive Backing

Specification

  • 3.10 in * 0.90 in * 10.00 in
  • 0.1000 lb
  • United States
  • GPCT1059

Details

*Features*:

*Multi-Purpose & Super Bright*:Used for the replacement and modification of headlights for automobiles. An ultra-bright white LED light(6000K) is used as a daytime running light. Besides,it can be used as backup light,fog light,chassis light and more.
*Strong Adhesive Backing*:This LED light strip sticky side used double-sided foam tape,which makes it more sticky and durable. No worry about falling off,and its surface with best resistance to yellowing.
*User-Friendly Design*:Features low power consumption,energy saving,water-proof,anti-collision and also utilizes COB(Chips on board) technology for enough cooling. Almost meet your all demand to day running light.
*Easy To Install*:Just connect it directly to 12V power source,then,it will light up when the car starts.(Note the positive(+) and negative(-) when wire up.)
*Water-resistant*:Designed with super slim LED strip and glass lens,which makes it water-resistant in rainy and foggy days.
*Super-long Lifespan*:Lasts up to 50,000 hours of illumination time


*Specifications*:

Product Type: LED Daytime Running Lights
Power Consumption: 5Wx2
Voltage: DC 12V
LED quantity: 28
Color Temperature: 6000K
Luminous Flux: 500lm
IP Rating: IP45
Cable Length: 23cm/9.1in
LED Strip Size: 17x1.5x0.25cm/7.0x0.6x0.098in (L×W×H)
Material: Aluminum

 

*Package Lists*:

2x Daytime Running Lights
